text:
STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE
Equipment: Centrifugal Compressor C-22
Document No: SOP-006
Hazard Level: LOW

1. PURPOSE
This procedure describes the lockout/tagout and inspection steps required before
performing maintenance on the Centrifugal Compressor C-22.

2. REQUIRED PPE
Technicians must wear the following before beginning work: respirator, chemical gloves, face shield.

3. PROCEDURE
   Step 1: Record readings in the CMMS work order.
   Step 2: Verify guard and enclosure are reinstalled before re-energizing.
   Step 3: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.
   Step 4: Notify shift supervisor before returning equipment to service.
   Step 5: Test emergency stop function.
   Step 6: Test emergency stop function.
   Step 7: Inspect bearing housing for abnormal vibration or heat discoloration.
   Step 8: Record readings in the CMMS work order.
   Step 9: Record readings in the CMMS work order.
   Step 10: Inspect bearing housing for abnormal vibration or heat discoloration.
   Step 11: Notify shift supervisor before returning equipment to service.

4. NOTES
Deviations from this procedure must be logged and approved by the maintenance supervisor.
